chunks.text:
# Business Glossary - E-Commerce Domain (Simplified)

This document defines the core business concepts for the e-commerce platform test dataset.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
CUSTOMER
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Definition**: An individual or entity registered on the platform who has made at least one purchase.

**Business Context**: Customers are the primary actors in the e-commerce system. They browse products, place orders, an... [TRUNCATED]

**Business Context**: Line items break down orders into individual product purchases. Each captures the price at the moment of ordering.

**Key Attributes**:
- Unique line identifier
- References exactly one Product
- Quantity of units ordered
- Unit price at time of order (historical, not current)
- Extended amount = quantity × unit price

**Business Rules**:
- A Sales Order must contain at least one line item
- Cannot be modified after order confirmation
- Unit price is fixed and does not chan... [TRUNCATED]

Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order is placed by exactly one Customer
- A Sales Order has one or more Order Line Items
- A Sales Order has one or more Payments
- A Sales Order has one or more Shipments

Order Line Item Relationships:
- An Order Line Item is part of exactly one Sales Order
- An Order Line Item references exactly one Product

Payment Relationships:
- A Payment is for exactly one Sales Order

Shipment Relationships:
- A Shipment is for exactly one Sales Order
- A Shipment co... [TRUNCATED]

## MODIFIED FOR TEST A
Refund: A reimbursement issued to a customer when an order is cancelled.

## SECOND MODIFICATION — extra term
Return Policy: Products can be returned within 30 days of purchase for a full refund.

# Data Dictionary - E-Commerce Database (Simplified)

This document describes the physical database schema for the simplified e-commerce test dataset.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
CUSTOMER_MASTER
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Master record for all registered platform customers.

**Primary Key**: CUST_ID (INT, auto-increment)

**Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-----------... [TRUNCATED]

**Foreign Keys**:
- CUST_ID → CUSTOMER_MASTER(CUST_ID)

**Business Concept Mapping**: SalesOrder

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
ORDER_LINE_ITEM
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Individual product lines within a sales order.

**Primary Key**: LINE_ID (INT, auto-increment)

**Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-------------|----------|
| LINE_ID | INT | Unique line identifier | NO... [TRUNCATED]

CUSTOMER_MASTER.CUST_ID
  └── SALES_ORDER_HDR.CUST_ID

TB_PRODUCT.PRODUCT_ID
  └── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.PRODUCT_ID

TB_CATEGORY.CATEGORY_ID
  ├── TB_PRODUCT.CATEGORY_ID
  └── TB_CATEGORY.PARENT_CATEGORY_ID (self-reference)

SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  ├── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.ORDER_ID
  ├── PAYMENT.ORDER_ID
  └── SHIPMENT.ORDER_ID

BUSINESS CONCEPT TO TABLE MAPPING
═════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

Customer         → CUSTOMER_MASTER
Product          → TB_PRODUCT
SalesOrder     ... [TRUNCATED]

triplets.subject: Product
triplets.object: ordered but remain for historical reference

triplets.subject: Sales Order
triplets.object: customer, items, payment status, delivery information

triplets.subject: Order Line Item
triplets.object: Unit price at time of order

entities_post_resolution.name: Wireless Headphones
entities_post_resolution.definition: Wireless Headphones are electronic audio devices that connect wirelessly to audio sources, used for personal listening.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: - Line 1: 2 units of Wireless Headphones at €79.99 each | - Line 2: 1 unit of USB Cable at €12.50

entities_post_resolution.name: 7 Years After
entities_post_resolution.definition: An entity representing timeframes related to customer purchase activities, including return periods and data retention durations.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: Business Rules: - Data retained for 7 years after last purchase | Return Policy: Products can be returned within 30 days of purchase for a full refund.

entities_post_resolution.name: Category Id
entities_post_resolution.definition: An entity representing a category in a database, where CATEGORY_ID is the unique identifier and CATEGORY_NAME is the display name of the category.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Column** | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-------------|----------|
| CATEGORY_ID | INT | Category reference | NO | | **Primary Key**: CATEGORY_ID (INT, auto-increment) | **Column** | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-------------|----------|
| CATEGORY_NAME | VARCHAR(200) | Category display name | NO |

entities_post_resolution.name: Customer Master
entities_post_resolution.definition: CUSTOMER_MASTER is a data entity that stores core customer information used across sales and order processing systems.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
CUSTOMER_MASTER.CUST_ID
  └── SALES_ORDER_HDR.CUST_ID | CUST_ID → CUSTOMER_MASTER(CUST_ID)

entities_post_resolution.name: Customer
entities_post_resolution.definition: A customer is an individual or entity registered on a platform who makes purchases or transactions, such as refunds, within the system.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
An individual or entity registered on the platform who has made at least one purchase. | Customers are the primary actors in the e-commerce system. | They browse products, place orders, and receive shipments. | Key Attributes: - Unique Customer ID | Key Attributes: - Valid email address (required for login) | Key Attributes: - One or more delivery/billing addresses | Key Attributes: - Geographic region for tax calculation | Key Attributes: - Active/inactive status | Business Rules: - Must place at least one order to remain active | Business Rules: - Can have multiple addresses but only one primary per type | Business Rules: - Data retained for 7 years after last purchase | Key Attributes: - References exactly one Customer | A Sales Order is placed by exactly one Customer | **Primary Key**: CUST_ID (INT, auto-increment) | **Column** | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-------------|----------|
| FULL_NAME | VARCHAR(200) | Customer's full name | NO | | **Column** | Type |

entities_post_resolution.name: Delivered At
entities_post_resolution.definition: SHIPPED_AT is a timestamp indicating when an item was shipped, marking the start of the delivery process.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Column** | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-------------|----------|
| DELIVERED_AT | DATETIME | Delivery timestamp | YES | | | SHIPPED_AT | DATETIME | Ship timestamp | YES |

entities_post_resolution.name: Line 1
entities_post_resolution.definition: An entity representing different types of electronic accessories or products listed in a sales context.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: - Line 1: 2 units of Wireless Headphones at €79.99 each | - Line 2: 1 unit of USB Cable at €12.50

entities_post_resolution.name: Line Item
entities_post_resolution.definition: A line item is an individual entry within a sales order or invoice that details a specific product, quantity, and price.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Key Attributes**:
- Unique line identifier | - References exactly one Product | - Quantity of units ordered | - Unit price at time of order (historical, not current) | **Business Context**: Line items break down orders into individual product purchases. | Each captures the price at the moment of ordering. | - A Sales Order must contain at least one line item

entities_post_resolution.name: Order Date
entities_post_resolution.definition: ORDER_DATE represents the date when an order was placed or initiated in the business process.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Column** | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-------------|----------|
| ORDER_DATE | DATE | Date order was placed | NO | | **Primary Key**: ORDER_ID (BIGINT, auto-increment) | - ORDER_ID → SALES_ORDER_HDR(ORDER_ID) | Key Attributes: - Order date when transaction was initiated

entities_post_resolution.name: Order Line Item
entities_post_resolution.definition: An Order Line Item is a specific product entry within a sales order, detailing the product, quantity, and price at the time of purchase.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
Key Attributes: - Must contain at least one Order Line Item | Definition: A single line within a Sales Order specifying a Product, quantity, and unit price at time of purchase. | Key Attributes: - References exactly one Product | Key Attributes: - Quantity of units ordered | Key Attributes: - Unit price at time of order (historical, not current) | Key Attributes: - Extended amount = quantity × unit price | An Order Line Item is part of exactly one Sales Order | An Order Line Item references exactly one Product | **Primary Key**: LINE_ID (INT, auto-increment) | **Description**: Individual product lines within a sales order. | TB_PRODUCT.PRODUCT_ID
  └── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.PRODUCT_ID | A Sales Order has one or more Order Line Items

entities_post_resolution.name: Order
entities_post_resolution.definition: An order is a formal request by a customer to purchase products or services, which can be canceled or broken down into individual line items.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: Refund: A reimbursement issued to a customer when an order is cancelled. | They browse products, place orders, and receive shipments. | **Business Context**: Line items break down orders into individual product purchases.

entities_post_resolution.name: Payment
entities_post_resolution.definition: A payment is a monetary transaction used to settle an order or invoice, which can be made through various methods.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: - References exactly one Sales Order | - Unique Payment ID | - Payment method (credit card, PayPal, bank transfer) | - Payment amount | - Confirmation timestamp | - Status: PENDING, CONFIRMED, FAILED, REFUNDED | A Payment is for exactly one Sales Order | **Description**: Monetary transactions settling order amounts. | **Primary Key**: PAYMENT_ID (BIGINT, auto-increment) | A Sales Order has one or more Payments

entities_post_resolution.name: Product Id
entities_post_resolution.definition: A product identifier and its display name used to uniquely identify and describe a product in a database.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Primary Key**: PRODUCT_ID (INT, auto-increment) | - PRODUCT_ID → TB_PRODUCT(PRODUCT_ID) | **Column** | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-------------|----------|
| PRODUCT_NAME | VARCHAR(300) | Product display name | NO | | Key Attributes: - Human-readable product name

entities_post_resolution.name: Sales Order Hdr
entities_post_resolution.definition: SALES_ORDER_HDR is a database table or entity that stores header information for sales orders, identified primarily by ORDER_ID.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
CUSTOMER_MASTER.CUST_ID
  └── SALES_ORDER_HDR.CUST_ID | - ORDER_ID → SALES_ORDER_HDR(ORDER_ID)

entities_post_resolution.name: Shipment
entities_post_resolution.definition: A shipment is the physical delivery of products to customers, typically associated with a sales order and identified by a unique shipment ID.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: - References exactly one Sales Order | - Unique Shipment ID | - Source Warehouse | - Destination Customer Address | - Shipped timestamp | - Tracking number | - Status: PREPARING, SHIPPED, IN_TRANSIT, DELIVERED | A Shipment is for exactly one Sales Order | A Shipment comes from exactly one Warehouse | A Shipment goes to exactly one Customer Address | **Description**: Physical delivery of products to customers. | **Primary Key**: SHIPMENT_ID (BIGINT, auto-increment) | A Sales Order has one or more Shipments | They browse products, place orders, and receive shipments.

entities_post_resolution.name: Shipped Timestamp
entities_post_resolution.definition: The shipped timestamp is the date and time when an item is dispatched from the seller or warehouse.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: - Shipped timestamp | | SHIPPED_AT | DATETIME | Ship timestamp | YES |

entities_post_resolution.name: Source Warehouse
entities_post_resolution.definition: A source warehouse is a storage facility from which goods are dispatched or originate in a supply chain process.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: - Source Warehouse | | WAREHOUSE_CODE | VARCHAR(20) | Source warehouse | YES |

entities_post_resolution.name: Tb Product
entities_post_resolution.definition: TB_PRODUCT is an entity representing a product in the business domain, identified by PRODUCT_ID, used in order line items and category classification.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
TB_PRODUCT.PRODUCT_ID
  └── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.PRODUCT_ID | TB_CATEGORY.CATEGORY_ID
  ├── TB_PRODUCT.CATEGORY_ID | - PRODUCT_ID → TB_PRODUCT(PRODUCT_ID)

entities_post_resolution.name: Unit Price
entities_post_resolution.definition: The unit price is the cost of a single unit of a product or service, typically expressed in a specific currency.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Column** | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-------------|----------|
| UNIT_PRICE | DECIMAL(10,2) | Price in EUR | NO | | Key Attributes: - Unit price in base currency (EUR) | - Unit price at time of order (historical, not current) | - Unit price is fixed and does not change with future price updates

entities_post_resolution.name: Return Policy
entities_post_resolution.definition: Return Policy: The rules and conditions under which customers can return products and receive refunds.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: Return Policy: Products can be returned within 30 days of purchase for a full refund. | Refund: A reimbursement issued to a customer when an order is cancelled.

entities_post_resolution.name: Cancelled If Not
entities_post_resolution.definition: Business Rules: - Can only be cancelled if not yet shipped
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: Business Rules: - Can only be cancelled if not yet shipped

entities_post_resolution.name: Categories
entities_post_resolution.definition: Business Context: Products are the core items that customers purchase. They are organized into categories and have inventory tracked across warehouses.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: Business Context: Products are the core items that customers purchase. They are organized into categories and have inventory tracked across warehouses.

entities_post_resolution.name: Change Daily
entities_post_resolution.definition: Business Rules: - Prices can change daily based on market conditions
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: Business Rules: - Prices can change daily based on market conditions

entities_post_resolution.name: Customer Items Payment
entities_post_resolution.definition: They track the customer, items, payment status, and delivery information.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: They track the customer, items, payment status, and delivery information.

entities_post_resolution.name: Delivery/Billing Addresses
entities_post_resolution.definition: Key Attributes: - One or more delivery/billing addresses
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: Key Attributes: - One or more delivery/billing addresses

entities_post_resolution.name: Exactly One Sales Order
entities_post_resolution.definition: - References exactly one Sales Order | - References exactly one Sales Order
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: - References exactly one Sales Order | - References exactly one Sales Order

entities_post_resolution.name: Fixed
entities_post_resolution.definition: - Unit price is fixed and does not change with future price updates
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: - Unit price is fixed and does not change with future price updates

entities_post_resolution.name: Multiple Addresses
entities_post_resolution.definition: Business Rules: - Can have multiple addresses but only one primary per type
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: Business Rules: - Can have multiple addresses but only one primary per type

entities_post_resolution.name: Ordered But Remain
entities_post_resolution.definition: Business Rules: - Inactive products cannot be ordered but remain for historical reference
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: Business Rules: - Inactive products cannot be ordered but remain for historical reference

entities_post_resolution.name: Price
entities_post_resolution.definition: Each captures the price at the moment of ordering.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: Each captures the price at the moment of ordering.

entities_post_resolution.name: Primary Actor
entities_post_resolution.definition: Customers are the primary actors in the e-commerce system.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: Customers are the primary actors in the e-commerce system.

entities_post_resolution.name: Purchase
entities_post_resolution.definition: An individual or entity registered on the platform who has made at least one purchase.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: An individual or entity registered on the platform who has made at least one purchase.

entities_post_resolution.name: Quantity × Unit Price
entities_post_resolution.definition: - Extended amount = quantity × unit price
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: - Extended amount = quantity × unit price

entities_post_resolution.name: Shipment Status
entities_post_resolution.definition: | STATUS_CODE | VARCHAR(20) | PREPARING/SHIPPED/IN_TRANSIT/DELIVERED | NO |
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: | STATUS_CODE | VARCHAR(20) | PREPARING/SHIPPED/IN_TRANSIT/DELIVERED | NO |

entities_post_resolution.name: Single Line
entities_post_resolution.definition: Definition: A single line within a Sales Order specifying a Product, quantity, and unit price at time of purchase.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: Definition: A single line within a Sales Order specifying a Product, quantity, and unit price at time of purchase.

entities_post_resolution.name: Status Changes
entities_post_resolution.definition: Status changes are logged for audit purposes
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: Status changes are logged for audit purposes

entities_post_resolution.name: Tangible Or Digital Item
entities_post_resolution.definition: Definition: A tangible or digital item offered for sale on the platform.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: Definition: A tangible or digital item offered for sale on the platform.

entities_post_resolution.name: Transaction Document
entities_post_resolution.definition: Definition: A formal transaction document recording the agreement between the platform and a Customer to supply Products.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: Definition: A formal transaction document recording the agreement between the platform and a Customer to supply Products.

tables_enriched.name: Customer Master
tables_enriched.description: This table stores core information about customers, including their contact details and account status.

tables_enriched.name: Product
tables_enriched.description: This table stores information about products available in the inventory, including identifiers, names, categories, pricing, and active status.

tables_enriched.name: Category
tables_enriched.description: This table stores information about product categories and their hierarchical relationships.

tables_enriched.name: Sales Order Header
tables_enriched.description: This table stores header information for sales orders, including order details, status, payment confirmation, and delivery timestamps.

tables_enriched.name: Order Line Item
tables_enriched.description: This table stores detailed information about each product line item within customer orders, including quantities, prices, and total amounts.

tables_enriched.name: Payment
tables_enriched.description: This table stores information about payments made for sales orders, including payment methods, amounts, statuses, and timestamps of confirmation and creation.

tables_enriched.name: Shipment
tables_enriched.description: This table stores information about shipments, including shipment identifiers, associated order references, warehouse locations, shipment dates, tracking details, and current shipment status.
